  "notes": "Just give me a second, we'll let Ben in.\r\nOkay, so Navins, can I change his name to?\r\nIf we going forward, Navin, if you can put Clara's display picture, they'll be helpful.\r\nClara's support, I'm changing your name.\r\nOkay, cool.\r\nI'll let him in.\r\nYes.\r\nThe good.\r\nAll right.\r\nLet him in in three, two, one.\r\nAnd Ben is in very sweet guy by the way.\r\nHe's in.\r\nHey, Ben, good afternoon.\r\nOh, wait.\r\nOh, hey, hi, good afternoon.\r\nHey, Ben, how are you?\r\nI'm doing well, are you?\r\nVery well.\r\nThank you",
